title: Scope
full_text:
3.4.1.1 Scope
Scope
1) Subject to the limitations stated in Article 3.4.1.2., where the building envelope
does not comply with the requirements of Section 3.2. or 3.3., it shall comply with
Part 8.

sentences.text: Subject to the limitations stated in Article 3.4.1.2., where the building envelope does not comply with the requirements of Section 3.2. or 3.3., it shall comply with Part 8.
